evals.expected_output: Checks dev-routing prerequisites (Caddyfile + ports.json exist). Reads ports.json, assigns next available port, adds 'myapp' to registry, creates sites/myapp.caddy with reverse_proxy config, checks if ~/src/myapp exists for vite/env configuration, reloads Caddy, reports dev URL (https://myapp.localhost) and assigned port.
expectations: Reads ports.json, assigns port, updates registry with new project
Creates Caddy site config at sites/myapp.caddy with correct reverse_proxy block

evals.expected_output: No project name given. Asks via AskUserQuestion. Does not infer from working directory or context.
expectations: Uses AskUserQuestion to request project name — does not infer from context
Does not proceed with any file operations before getting the name

evals.expected_output: Uses user-provided port 5555 instead of auto-assigning. Verifies no collision with existing projects in ports.json. Registers 'payments' at port 5555, creates site config, configures project if it exists at ~/src/payments, reloads Caddy.
expectations: Uses the explicit port 5555 instead of nextPort from registry
Checks for port collision with existing projects before registering
Reports https://payments.localhost with port 5555 in the summary
